objective: Independently validate whether the frozen P16 checkpoint supports classifying P15's SDK failure as a 5-second timeout-budget fault and accepting the candidate semantic matrix.
required_checks: Replay verify.mjs once without changing the checkpoint.
Recompute every command count, exit code, duration, pass count, and before/after hash decision.
Confirm the package-export command kept assertions unchanged and changed only the test timeout budget.
Confirm the 13.54-second package-export result explains the prior 5-second timeout without claiming product causality.
Confirm no performance rerun and no product, Git, PR, test, config, or benchmark edit occurred.
Return accept or reject with an exact hashed report.
anti_goals: Do not rerun semantic commands, performance, or benchmarks.
Do not edit product, evidence, Git, PR, tests, or configuration.
Do not accept by narrative alone.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
